headline: After CBS report, C.H. Robinson seeks to deflect safety responsibility to FMCSA
summary: A report by CBS on trucking and brokerages spurred a lengthy response from C.H. Robinson. The post After CBS report, C.H. Robinson seeks to deflect safety responsibility to FMCSA appeared first on FreightWaves.
